db_password.title: Database password
db_password.description: Password for the internal Immich database

upload_size.title: Photo library storage
upload_size.description: Disk space reserved for your photos and videos — can be expanded later

timezone.title: Timezone
timezone.description: Used for correct EXIF timestamps (e.g. Europe/Paris, America/New_York)

immich_version.title: Version
immich_version.description: Immich image tag — leave as 'release' to always use the latest stable
